caption: A woman with brown hair and glasses, wearing a grey cardigan over a white floral blouse, sits at a white desk in a craft room. Behind her, shelves hold various supplies, and a logo on the wall reads "CHRI STOSS". To her left, a lamp and various colorful markers are visible. On the desk, several notebooks are open, and a logo that says "Camping Jill" is visible in the bottom left. Throughout the sequence, the woman speaks and gestures with her hands. She begins by looking forward with her hands resting on the desk, then brings her hands together in front of her chest while speaking. In the final frames, she lowers her hands back toward the open notebooks on the desk, shifting her gaze downward to look at the pages.
